pr.title: feat(discover): adopt ABI V2 stage naming (1-3) and remove Stage 2 label block

receipt.goal: Merge deprecated Discover Stage 2 note semantics into Stage 1, relabel old Stage 3->2 and Stage 4->3, and align age-band template export/dictionary to ABI V2 column names.
decisions_made: Kept database storage model unchanged; only stage naming semantics changed in template/docs/UI copy.
Renamed exported columns to ABI V2: stage1_why_it_matters_ux_description, stage2_*, stage3_*.
Removed explicit 'Stage 2' label from Discover notes section, now titled 'Why this matters'.
Relabeled Play ideas to Stage 2 and Product examples to Stage 3.
verification_steps: Build succeeded: pnpm build in web/
CSV regeneration succeeded: full 163 rows + 10-row sample from live 25-27m data
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert this branch/PR; regenerate CSVs from previous script version if needed.
